items.title: Why The Narrative Around Home Depot Is Shifting After Cautious New Analyst Targets
items.description: Home Depot’s narrative has subtly shifted as analysts trim their fair value estimate to about $399 from roughly $403, reflecting slightly softer assumptions for revenue growth and a modestly higher discount rate of about 8.9% versus roughly 8.7%. These tweaks mirror a more cautious near-term backdrop, even as the long-term story around its earnings power and market share potential remains intact. Read on to see how this evolving view is shaping the stock’s trajectory and how you can stay...

items.title: Will Q4 Be Weaker for Home Depot as Storm Comparisons Intensify?
items.description: HD braces for a tougher Q4 as fading storm-driven demand and difficult comps weigh on sales momentum.

items.title: Trump Will Pounce on Jobs Data. Why It’s a Crunch Moment for the Fed.
items.description: Delayed jobs and inflation data come out this week, Supreme Court tariffs decision looms, SpaceX could serve up a feast in 2026, and more news to start your day.

items.title: 1 Dow Jones Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Brush Off
items.description: The Dow Jones (^DJI) is made up of 30 of the most established and influential companies in the market. But even blue-chip stocks can struggle - some are dealing with slowing growth, outdated business models, or increasing competition.
